Search Results for "CSE 4153"

CSE 4153 Data Communications and Computer Networks: 3 hours.

(Prerequisites: Grade of C or better in CSE 3724 or ECE 3724). Three hours lecture. The concepts and practices of data communications and networking to provide the student with an understanding of the hardware
